3235000.name: Kagura Survivors x Summer Memories
3235000.description:
In a quiet, familiar ocean town, rifts between worlds begin to open. Three unlikely heroines find themselves facing a horde of monsters. But along with the monsters come new powers. Can they survive the coming Endless Night?

In collaboration with the developer Dojin Otome, we're excited to bring you the first DLC to Kagura Survivors: Endless Night! Featuring Miyuki, Rio, and Yui from the hit game Summer Memories!

Features:

  • Three New Playable Characters

  • New Unique Abilities That Highlight Each Character

  • A New Yet Familiar Map to Explore
3235000.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 简体中文
